creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Project has moved to https://github.com/cil-project/cil and upstream don't have time to work on it. It also appears to eat up quite a bit of our time trying to get it to at least build. Time to consider removal?

Reference:
https://github.com/cil-project/cil/pull/42#issuecomment-391818549
